_comment: Private metadata for mlx-movie-director model registry.
name: vbvr-licon-ltx2.3
description: LiconStudio VBVR LoRA for LTX-2.3 — improves complex prompt following, motion dynamics, and temporal consistency. Trained on full VBVR dataset (~1M videos). ComfyUI format, compatible with MLX pipeline LTXV_LORA_COMFY_RENAMING_MAP.
test_prompt: a person opens a door and walks through into a bright room
notes: Key format: diffusion_model.transformer_blocks.N.attn1.to_k.lora_A.weight (no .default. segment). This matches LTXV_LORA_COMFY_RENAMING_MAP directly. 2304 keys, 408MB. siraxe variant has .lora_A.default.weight which does NOT match the renaming map.
